creator: sa2c@sa2c.net
text:
Hi,

David Naylor wrote:
> VMware have released vmware-tools under GPL: 
> http://open-vm-tools.sourceforge.net.  I got it to compile cleanly and run 
> under FreeBSD-current and VMServer 1.0.3.  This might be able to replace all 
> the vmware-tools* and vmware-guestd* ports however this will need to be 
> confirmed.  

Nice!

I'm interested in open-vm-tools and am planning to port it, but you
already did. :-)

I agree to withdraw this PR.

Thanks,
-- 
NIIMI Satoshi
